news.title: China installing AI cameras in classrooms to analyse children's behaviour
news.description: [BANGKOK POST] China is accelerating its push for "Smart Campuses" through the use of artificial intelligence and big data technology to monitor and analyse classroom behaviour and teaching patterns of both students and teachers in real time.

news.title: Court finds Google liable for false AI answers in landmark case
